title: SOP: WiFi Authentication Failure
content:
Use this SOP when users get invalid credentials or authentication failure on WiFi.

Step 1: Confirm identity source.
- Verify username format and domain.
- Confirm account is active and not locked.

Step 2: Validate access policy.
- Check if user/group is allowed on the SSID.
- Verify device compliance policy if NAC is enabled.

Step 3: Remove stale profile.
- Forget the WiFi network profile.
- Re-add SSID with approved security settings.

Step 4: Check certificate/time sync.
- For EAP-TLS or cert-based auth, confirm certificate validity.
- Ensure endpoint time is synchronized.

Step 5: Review RADIUS/controller logs.
- Capture rejection reason code.
- Correlate timestamp with user attempt.

Step 6: Escalate with evidence.
- Raise incident with username, SSID, time, controller log reason, and endpoint details.
